## Security Requirements Checklist

### Data & Access

* [ ] No sensitive information (API keys, credentials, tokens, secrets) is committed
* [ ] Access control and authorization requirements were reviewed
* [ ] Principle of least privilege is maintained
* [ ] No unnecessary permissions were introduced

### Application Security

* [ ] Inputs are validated and sanitized where applicable
* [ ] Output encoding / injection protections were considered
* [ ] Dependencies introduced are reviewed for security impact
* [ ] No known vulnerable packages were added
* [ ] Authentication and session behavior remain unchanged or documented

### Infrastructure & Configuration

* [ ] Environment variables are documented if added/changed
* [ ] Secure defaults are preserved
* [ ] Configuration changes were reviewed for security impact

## Testing

### Verification Performed

* [ ] Unit tests
* [ ] Integration tests
* [ ] Manual testing
* [ ] Security-related testing (if applicable)

## Deployment Considerations

* [ ] No deployment impact
* [ ] Requires configuration changes
* [ ] Requires database migration

## Reviewer Checklist

* [ ] Scope matches requirements
* [ ] Security checklist reviewed
* [ ] Documentation updated if needed
* [ ] Tests are sufficient
* [ ] No unexpected side effects
